message:
fix(safety): command injection guards, OpenAI stream ordering, iterative skill loader

- src/package_manager.rs: insert "--" argument separator before
  user-supplied package specs/names in npm install, npm uninstall,
  and git clone commands to prevent argument injection via malicious
  package names (e.g., "--exec=..." would be interpreted as a flag)
- src/providers/openai.rs: reorder process_choice() to process the
  delta content/tool_calls BEFORE handling finish_reason — fixes a
  bug where the final text chunk in a stream was dropped because
  the early return on finish_reason skipped delta processing. Also
  emits TextStart/TextEnd events for proper text block lifecycle.
- src/resources.rs: convert recursive load_skills_from_dir_inner to
  iterative stack-based traversal, eliminating unbounded recursion
  risk from deep directory trees while preserving symlink cycle
  detection via visited_dirs HashSet
- src/interactive/share.rs: add 17 unit tests covering parse_gist_url,
  format_command_output, share_gist_description, parse_share_is_public
- src/interactive/tool_render.rs: add unit tests for split_diff_prefix
  and pretty_json helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
